titleStmt.title: SII 18.337: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 337. (B.K. No. 16 of 1932-33.) DĒVANGĒRI, HAVERI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Hero-stone in the temple of Mallikārjuna.

summary.p: This inscription is dated in Śaka 1[00]2, Raudri, Āśvayuja ba. 5, Sunday, corresponding to A.D. 1080, October 5, Monday f.d.t. ·54.

It describes the valour of Kaleya Nāyaka of Dēvaṁgēri who fought for Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Jōyimarasa of the Jimūtavāhana lineage and Khachara family, when the latter attacked Guttaḷal. A grant of land is stated to have been made in commemoration of the hero.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti sakavaruśaṁ 1002 neya raudrisaṁvatseradayāśvayuja ba 5 Ā . dēvaṁ gēriya kaleyanāya
kanuṁ . svasti samastavasumatītaḷavikhyātaṁ jīmūtavāhenānvayaprasūta baṁdhujana kamaḷinīrājahaṁ
saṁ . khacaravaṁśōttaṁsaṁ padmāvatīlabdhavaraprasādaru tyāgavinōdaṁ biruda(ṁ) maṁneyamadanivāra
ṇaṁ yityādināmāḷaṁkritaṁ śrīgōyiṁdēśvaradibyaśrīpādapadmārādhakarumappa mahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ jōyimarasaru
guttaḷala kādahōdalli dēvaṁgēriya kaleyanāyakanu māḍida samarāṁgaṇā . ya ṁteṁdaḍe . yidirāgi hōgi
hayamumanadirade mārkkoṁḍu niṁdu samarāṁgaṇadoḷu cadaṟade kaḍugali kalleya padahatadiṁ koṁda vairisēneyanāgaḷu

dirci tāguvara vayiriśiraṁgaḷa(ṁ) nikki meṭṭi vīrarā siraṁ kaḷaci bisunettara dhāreya miduḷaṁ teraḷci māṟāṁtara
raḷci karuḷōḷigaḷaṁ teraḷci taṟitiṟideraḍuṁ balamuṁ poga māgekalleyanājiraṇaraṁgadoḷu
da cāturttha kaṇiyenisida baṁdhujanada gōtrakulāgraṇiyeni sida subhaṭagradakaṇiyeniProbably mistakecāturya
kalleyaṁ raṇamukhadoḷu . jitena labhyate lakṣmīrmritenāpi surāṁgana kṣaṇavi dhvaṁsini kāye
ṇe raṇe . yā bīragaligeyū parivāra vūriṁ baḍagageyalu kaḷavoḷeya dāriyalu
dāna yāstaḷadalu Erekaṁma 10 Antu kaṁmma 20 maṁ davargge hariharaContinuation is
Digital edition of SII 18.337 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
